library.title: Laeborari
library.subtitle: Diporojeke tsa gago tsa lentswe le katara, go tswa mo mogopolong go ya kwa go gololeng.

no_results.title: Ga go na diporojeke tse di bonweng
no_results.description: Leka go fetola patlo kgotsa setlhotlhi sa seemo.

empty.title: Laeborari ya gago ga e na sepe
empty.description: Simolola porojeke e ntšhwa go tswa kwa tshimologong, kgotsa romelateng tse o setseng o na le tsone mo disekeng.

project_dialog.title: Porojeke e ntšhwa
project_dialog.description: E fe lebitso mme o kgethe mokgwa wa ho rekota.

album_dialog.title: Alebamo e ntšhwa
album_dialog.description: Diporojeke tse di amanang le setlhopha mo alebamong.

album.empty: Ga go ise go nne le diporojeke mo alebamong eno.
album.delete_confirm_description: Diporojeke ga di kitla di phimolwa, di tla phimolwa fela go tswa mo " {{name}} ".

delete_project.confirm_description: Sena se tlosa porojeke le mong le e mong nka ka eona. Se ga se ka ke sa dirololwa.

record.title: Rekota
record.subtitle: Tshwara setshwantsho se se phepa, lebelela maemo a gago, mme o latele sekwalwa.
record.device_empty: Ga go na didiriswa tsa go tsenya tse di bonweng.

guide.title: Thulaganyo e e kaelwang
guide.subtitle: Dira gore mokatisi a go tsamaise mo sekwalong kgato ka kgato, go tswa mo go thuthafatseng go ya kwa polelong e e buiwang.
guide.unavailable: Thulaganyo e e kaelwang ga e ise e nne teng mo sefareng.
guide.select_project_device: Tlhopha porojeke le sediriswa sa go tsenya go rekota dikgato go tswa fano.
guide.mark_done: Ke dirile — kgato e e latelang
guide.no_record_step: Kgato ya go thuthafatsa — ga go tlhokege go rekota.
guide.complete_body: O gatisitse kgato nngwe le nngwe ya sekwalwa. Boela kwa thebong ya Modumo wa porojeke mme o tlhophe ditshwantsho tse o di ratang.

best2min.button: Batla metsotso e le 2 e e gaisang (Suno)
best2min.hint: E tsamaisa tshekatsheko ya maatla le go tlhaloganyesega ga nako yotlhe go bona fensetere ya yone e e nonofileng ya metsotso e le 2 — o sa ntse o ka fetola selekanyo ka seatla morago ga moo.
best2min.unavailable: Tshekatsheko e e gaisang ya metsotso e le 2 ga e ise e nne teng mo sefareng eno.

record.takes_title: Ditsaya go tswa mo thulaganyong eno
record.takes_empty: Ga go ise go rekotiwe ditshwantsho mo thulaganyong eno.
record.ws_disconnected: Go golagana gape le mmitara wa selekanyo...
record.select_project_first: Tlhopha porojeke e o tla e simololang.

no_takes.title: Ga go ise go tsewe
no_takes.description: Rekota tseo e ntšhwa kgotsa reka faele e e leng teng.

audio.delete_take_confirm_description: The tala mamelwang le mong le e mong sebetswa phetolelo tla tlosoa.

pipeline.title: Ketane ya go baakanya
pipeline.stage_requires_extra: E tlhoka tlaleletso e e sa tsenngwang
pipeline.no_stages: Ga go na dikgato tse di leng teng.

export.title: Thomelontle
export.description: Rantsha faele ya bofelo go tswa mo mofuteng o o dirilweng.

notes.placeholder: Dintlha tsa foromo e e sa duelelweng ka ga porojeke eno...

lyrics.placeholder: Kwala mafoko a pina fa. Dirisa phalete e e mo letlhakoreng go tsenya ditheke tsa meta tsa Suno.
lyrics.versions_empty: Ga go ise go nne le mefuta e e bolokilweng.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: Mokwalo wa ga jaanong o tla emisediwa ka mofuta o o bolokilweng mo go {{date}} .
lyrics.metatags_hint: Tobetsa theke go e tsenya mo sesupong.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: Unproven - ka 'na ba le phello efe kapa efe ka sephetho.
lyrics.metatags_empty: Ga go na di-meta-tag tse di kwadisitsweng.

prompts.preview_empty: Tlhopha thempoleite o bo o tlatsa diphetogophetogo go bona tebopele.
prompts.char_count_warning: Ditlhotlheletso tsa setaele tse di fetang ditlhaka di le 1000 di ka nna tsa kgaolwa ke Suno.
prompts.copied: E kopolotswe mo lebokosong la peeletso
prompts.history_empty: Ga go na mefuta e e fetileng.

stems.title: Mantswe le katara
stems.separate_button: Mantswe a a farologaneng le katara
stems.empty: This take ga e ise e kgaoganngwe. Taboga kgaogano go utlwa mantswe le katara ka go itlhaola.
stems.capability_missing: Kgaoganyo ya motswedi ga e a tsenngwa mo sefareng eno.
stems.unavailable: Kgaogano ya lentswe/katara ga e ise e nne teng mo sefareng eno.

import.title: Thomeloteng
import.subtitle: Tlisa diporojeke tse di setseng di le teng mo disekeng mo laeboraring.

step1.title: Batla foltara
step1.description: Supa foldara ya motso ka diporojeke tsa gago le dipina.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg ga e a bonwa — difaele tse di tlhokang phetolo di tla tlolwa.

step2.title: Sekaseka dintlha
step2.description: Tlhola maina, maemo, le se se tla romelwateng pele o tlhomamisa.

step3.title: Thomeloteng
step3.description: Netefatsa go kopololela difaele le go tlhama diporojeke.
step3.copy_originals: Kopolola difaele tsa tshimologo mo laeboraring
step3.done_description: Diporojeke tse di fa tlase di tlhamilwe mo laeboraring ya gago.

templates.title: Dithempoleite
templates.subtitle: Dithempoleite tsa potso tse di ka dirisiwang gape le di-meta-tag tsa Suno.
templates.delete_confirm_description: Se ga se ka ke sa dirololwa.
templates.empty: Ga go ise go nne le dithempoleite.

editor.template_hint: Tshwaya moo mofuta mongwe le mongwe o leng teng ka leina la one le phuthetswe ka dithapo tse pedi tse di sothegileng — ka sekai, mofuta o o bidiwang "mofuta" o nna mofuta o o phuthetsweng ka dithapo tse pedi tse di bulang le tse pedi tse di tswalang.

metatags.title: Metatheke
metatags.subtitle: Ditheke tsa sebopeho le tsa setaele Suno o lemoha mantswe a ka hare.

tier_legend.1: Tier 1 — e e kwadilweng le e e tlhomameng
tier_legend.4: Tier 4 — seokobatsi sa seokobatsi, se se sa netefadiwang

metatags.empty: Ga go ise go nne le di-meta-tag tse di itiretsweng.

settings.title: Diseting
settings.subtitle: Tshedimosetso ya tsamaiso, puo, le ditlhopho tsa thulaganyetsoruri.

gpu.ort_providers: Batlamedi ba ONNX ba nako ya go dira

settings.gpu_none: Ga go na batlamedi ba GPU ba ba lemogilweng
settings.lufs_target_hint: E dirisiwa jaaka tshitshinyo ya tshimologo fa o romela ntle o tsaya. Suno ya thulaganyetsoruri e nna go dikologa -14 LUFS.

guide.title: Kaedi ya go rekota ya Suno
guide.subtitle: Tsela ya go tshwara lentswe le katara e tsaya gore o bone dipholo tse di gaisang.
guide.intro: Suno e dira sentle thata ka ditshupiso tse di phepa, tse di sa belaetseng. Kaedi eno e akaretsa go ipaakanyetsa, maemo a a ikaeletsweng, le sekwalwa sa go rekota sa metsotso e le 3–5.

prep.title: Go baakanyetsa
prep.body: Rekota mo phaposing e e alafilweng kgotsa e e nang le dilo tse dintsi tse di bonolo (digaretene, dikhapete, diaparo mo lebokosong). Tima di fan le sengwe le sengwe se se dumang. Thuthafatsa lentswe la gago metsotso e le 5 pele ga o rekota.

levels.title: Maemo: -12 go ya go -6 dBFS
levels.body: Ikemisetse ditlhora tse di fa gare ga -12 le -6 dBFS mo mmitareng. Fa o le kwa tlase ga selekanyo seo, modumo wa lemorago o nna le lemotshega thata; fa godimo ga yone, kotsi ya go poma e a tlhatloga. Dirisa mmitara mo tsebeng ya Rekoto go seta poelo ya gago pele o simolola.

distance.title: Sekgala sa maekerofouno: 15–30 cm
distance.body: Dula 15 ho isa ho 30 cm ho tloha maekerofounong. Gaufi go feta moo go feteletsa plosives le phelelo ya go nna gaufi; kgakala e tsaya reverb e ntsi ya kamore le modumo.

script.title: Go rekota sekeripiti
script.vowels: Ditumanosi tse di tshegediwang — a, e, ke, o, u
script.scales: Dikala tse di bonolo, kwa godimo le kwa tlase
script.excerpt: Nopolo ya pina (dibara di le 8 go ya go di le 16)
script.dynamics: Diphetogo: simolola ka bonolo, felela kwa godimo
script.spoken_phrase: Polelwana e le nngwe e e buiwang, gore Suno a kgone go bala segalo sa lentswe la gago

expectations.title: Se Suno a se solofetseng
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, e omile (ga go na reverb kgotsa ditlamorago), metsotso e le 3 go ya go e le 5 ya tshupiso. Metsotso e le 2 e e phepa go gaisa, e e emelang thata ya go tsaya gantsi e ntsha dipholo tse di gaisang.

suno_voice_full.name: Mokwalo o o feletseng wa lentswe la ga Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: Metsotso e le 5 e e kaelwang: go ithutafatsa, ditumanosi, dikala, dinopolo tse pedi tsa pina, diphetogo, le polelo e e buiwang.

step.warmup_inst: Rekolola ka go tlhotlhora, go tlhotlhora dipounama (brrr), le go duma ka bonolo mo e ka nnang motsotso. Ga go tlhokege go rekota — ke fela go repa mometso pele o opela.
step.vowels_inst: Tshwara tumanosi nngwe le nngwe — a, e, i, o, u — metsotswana e le 3 go ya go e le 4 ka segalo sa gago se se phuthologileng, ka modumo o o tlhomameng. Seno se thusa Suno go tsaya timbre e e phepa ya lentswe la gago.
step.scales: Dikala go ya kwa godimo le kwa tlase
step.scales_inst: Opela sekale se se bonolo go ya kwa godimo le kwa tlase, ka "la" kgotsa "na". Ga e tlhoke go nna e e itekanetseng — boikaelelo ke go dira mmapa wa lentswe la gago.
step.section_inst: Opela dibara di le 8 go ya go di le 16 tsa pina, ka boikaelelo jwa mmatota jo o batlang go bo fetisa. Dira gore go tlhaloganyesega le go nna teng go tle pele ga go itekanela ga setegeniki.
step.section2_inst: Opela dibara tse dingwe di le 8 go ya go di le 16 — go ka nna molemo fa e le khwaere kgotsa karolo e e farologaneng le e e fetileng. More mefutafuta e thusa mohlala ho ithuta lentswe la hao.
step.dynamics_inst: Opela polelo e le nngwe o simolola ka bonolo thata mme o felele kwa godimo, o sa gagamatse mometso wa gago. Se se bontsha Suno selekanyo sa maatla a lentswe la gago.
step.spoken_inst: Bua — o se ka wa opela — polelo e khutshwane, ya tlholego, jaaka e kete o a tlotla. Seno se thusa Suno go lemoga timbre ya mmatota ya lentswe la gago.

stages.highpass: Setlhotlhi sa phase e e kwa godimo
stages.lowpass: Setlhotlhi sa phase e e kwa tlase
stages.loudness: Go tlwaetsa modumo o o kwa godimo (LUFS)
stages.quality: Tokafatso ya boleng (ya maemo a a kwa godimo)
stages.fade: Nyamela mo teng / nyelela kwa ntle

presets.voice_guitar_balanced: Lentswe le katara e e lekalekaneng

errors.network: Ga e kgone go fitlhelela sefara.
errors.validation_error: Tlhola tshedimosetso e o e tsentseng.
errors.device_busy: Audio sesebediswa e sebediswa ke lenaneo le leng.
errors.device_not_found: Sediriswa sa modumo ga se bonwe.
errors.already_recording: Go setse go tsweletse ka kgatiso.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg ga e a tsenngwa — e tsenye go fetola faele eno.
errors.disk_full: Ga go na sebaka se se lekaneng mo disekeng.
errors.permission_denied: Tetla e gannwe ya tsela e e neetsweng.
errors.import_path_not_found: Tsela ya thomeloteng ga e bonwe.
errors.job_cancelled: Go dira tiro go ne ga phimolwa.
errors.process_failed: E paletswe ke go dira tiro ya go tsaya.
errors.export_failed: E paletswe ke go romela faele kwa ntle.
errors.record_failed: E paletswe ke go simolola go rekota.
